ddls:
CREATE TABLE "text_samples" (
  "text_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each text sample */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the text */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the text was submitted */,
  "text_content" TEXT /* The actual content of the submitted text */,
  "text_title" TEXT /* Title of the text sample */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain or category of the text */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the text */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_samples_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, educator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "text_id" TEXT /* ID of the text sample analyzed */,
  "cohesion_score" REAL /* Score for cohesion */,
  "syntax_score" REAL /* Score for syntax */,
  "vocabulary_score" REAL /* Score for vocabulary */,
  "phraseology_score" REAL /* Score for phraseology */,
  "grammar_score" REAL /* Score for grammar */,
  "conventions_score" REAL /* Score for conventions */,
  "plagiarism_score" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of plagiarism */,
  "readability_score" REAL /* Score indicating the readability of the text */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score indicating the sentiment of the text */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_analysis_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the feedback is based on */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Detailed feedback on the text */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improving the text */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Overall sentiment of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES text_analysis ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "text_id" TEXT /* ID of the text sample for which the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* The content of the report summarizing the analysis */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., detailed, summary) */,
  "report_length" INTEGER /* Length of the report in words */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_tracking" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress tracking entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose progress is being tracked */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tracking period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tracking period */,
  "metric_improvement" TEXT /* Summary of improvements in various metrics */,
  "initial_score" REAL /* Initial score for the metric being tracked */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score for the metric being tracked */,
  "improvement_percentage" REAL /* Percentage improvement in the metric */,
  "tracked_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who is tracking the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
